hero.name: Ayush Singh
hero.title: System Engineer | Infrastructure Full Stack Developer

about.title: About Me
about.description: System Engineer at Infosys with 3+ years of experience building backend services, AI workflows, and data-driven systems. Proficient in Python and Node.js development, Generative AI integrations using OpenAI APIs, large-scale AI data annotation pipelines, and analytics reporting. Skilled in full stack engineering with React.js and modern frameworks, blockchain-based applications using Solidity and Ethereum, and AI data operations. Passionate about creating scalable, intelligent solutions that bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI and real-world applications.

projects.title: Crypto Wallet
projects.description: Decentralized crypto wallet enabling users to send and receive cryptocurrency using wallet addresses. Implemented Ethereum smart contracts using Solidity for secure on-chain transaction execution.

projects.title: CoCo - AI Agent and SaaS Application Marketplace
